mapper.sql: id, saga_id, title, content, location, latitude, longitude, node_time, photos, is_milestone, sort_order, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM saga_nodes WHERE saga_id = #{sagaId} ORDER BY node_time ASC, sort_order ASC, created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO saga_nodes ( saga_id, title, content, location, latitude, longitude, node_time, photos, is_milestone, sort_order ) VALUES ( #{sagaId}, #{title}, #{content, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{location, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{latitude, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{longitude, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{nodeTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{photos, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{isMilestone}, #{sortOrder} )
mapper.update: UPDATE saga_nodes SET title = #{title}, content = #{content, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, location = #{location, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, latitude = #{latitude, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, longitude = #{longitude, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, node_time = #{nodeTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, photos = #{photos, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, is_milestone = #{isMilestone}, sort_order = #{sortOrder} WHERE id = #{id} AND saga_id = #{sagaId}
